race.comment: Open race. DANTOOINE (3) is racing very well, a good winner at Warrnambool over the carnival before just finding one better over this route last time out but still trying hard for second. He'll get every chance on speed from the gate and can go one better. CARDI BEE (9) was a handy winner over this track and trip two back, okay last start in a very bunched finish which wasn't much of a guide. She draws to get a long way back but will be charging late. CAMP CABLE (8) won two on the bounce prior to last start when struggling at Sandown Lakeside. Up in trip could suit now and slightly firmer footing wouldn't hurt either. BLUE BANDIT (6) is off a win at Pakenham and can measure up.
